scope.target: Publish remediation evidence, obtain independent post-audit, reconcile findings, and close lifecycle.
constraints: Do not rewrite the immutable baseline report.
Do not close without explicit status for every finding and commit evidence.

steps: Create and update the remediation evidence ledger.
Run aggregate quick and context gates.
Invoke ai-context-auditor read-only on this workflow branch for report 03.
Reconcile every finding and residual risk.
Complete task/workflow/backlog state, commit, and merge only after closure checks.
execution.last_completed_step: Closure contract and independent ownership boundary recorded.
execution.next_action: Wait until AICR-001 through AICR-004 are completed and committed.
